summary: Top signals: Anthropic Claude Code making-of, OpenAI coding evals, Google vibe coding course, CVE in Cline, stealth MCP browser automation, multi-agent workflow engine, Go agent harness, Claude Sonnet 5, ADK Go 2.0, Microsoft Flint, Anthropic containment practices, and a user automation stack.

candidates.title: The Making of Claude Code
candidates.why_it_matters: Inside story of Claude Code's evolution from internal CLI to Anthropic's coding agent.

candidates.title: Separating Signal from Noise: Coding Evaluations
candidates.why_it_matters: OpenAI's approach to coding evaluations for agents—key for benchmarking.

candidates.title: Google Vibe Coding Course on Kaggle
candidates.why_it_matters: User report of Google's agentic engineering course covering workflows and security.

candidates.title: CVE-2026-59723: Cline WebSocket Hijacking
candidates.why_it_matters: Real vulnerability in Cline agent dashboard—highlights agent security risks.

candidates.title: Stealth Chrome DevTools MCP
candidates.why_it_matters: Undetectable browser automation for AI agents via MCP—anti-detection and CDP access.

candidates.title: Agent Workflow Engine
candidates.why_it_matters: Multi-agent workflow engine composing Claude Code, Codex, Gemini with schema handoffs.

candidates.title: Go Agent Harness (micro/go-micro)
candidates.why_it_matters: Mature Go framework for building agent services—highly starred and widely used.

candidates.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5
candidates.why_it_matters: New frontier model from Anthropic with strong coding and agent performance.

candidates.title: ADK Go 2.0 Multi-Agent Framework
candidates.why_it_matters: Google's graph-based workflow engine for building reliable multi-agent applications.

candidates.title: Microsoft Flint Visualization Language
candidates.why_it_matters: New visualization language for AI agents from Microsoft—improves agent observability.

candidates.title: How Anthropic Contains Claude Across Products
candidates.why_it_matters: Engineering deep-dive on agent containment and blast radius reduction strategies.

candidates.title: Free Automation Stack (OpenHuman, Ollama, MiMoCode)
candidates.why_it_matters: User shares practical local-first agent stack for email, content, reports.
